category_sources: source_facts.description says run a command when files change; official README says Reflex watches a directory and reruns commands when files change.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Reflex; source_facts.name is reflex.
docs_sources: No dedicated official docs site was identified; official GitHub README provides installation, usage, options, examples, and notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/cespare/reflex; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README describes watching directories, rerunning commands, service restart mode, config files, regex/glob matching, and command-line usage.
